name: Dragonland rpg
description: Dragonland rpg, an rpg where you had got into a country full of dragon people! From the dawn of time, the world housed two continents, one of which was inhabited by humans, the other one by dragonborne. However  five thousand years ago, mages from both continents decided that it would be better for humans and dragons to be separated. Now, lots of time had passed, and no one knows if dragons still exist. Being the cocky adventurer you are, you decide to find out by yourself! Based on a book I read online
creator: AritshokKo
